Business: Happy Forgings Limited manufactures and sells forgings and related components in India and internationally. The company offers crankshafts; differential cases; front axle beams and steering knuckles; railway parts, including camshafts, connecting rods, piston pins, spacers, and others; brake flanges and suspension brackets; transmission parts, such…

  Current: 120.50  (-0.21% vs prior)
  India impact: Stronger DXY → FII outflows from India, rupee weakens; weaker DXY → FII inflows rise

  Current: 3.63 %  (+0.00% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher Fed rate → capital flows to USD, EM selling pressure; cuts → EM relief rally

CBOE VIX [2026-07-16]
  Current: 16.73  (+6.76% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows
